doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: Florida law still requires LFO completion under Jones v. DeSantis precedent, and this purported memo reverses that requirement with fabricated citations and reference numbers.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such memo exists; Florida law still requires LFO completion for rights restoration, and "Jones v. DeSantis" plus the cited reference number appear invented.
